name: Planful FP&A API
what_it_does: Planful REST API for cloud financial planning and analysis (FP&A) platform. Enables AI agents to load financial data, trigger plan calculations, retrieve reports and forecasts, manage budget versions, and integrate financial planning data with ERP and BI systems. Planful provides unified budgeting, consolidation, reporting, and analysis for finance teams.
use_cases: Loading actuals data from ERP into planning models from finance integration agents
Triggering budget calculations and consolidations from financial close agents
Retrieving forecast and variance reports from FP&A analytics agents
Automating management reporting from financial reporting agents
not_for: Simple spreadsheet budgeting without enterprise FP&A scale
Transaction-level accounting without planning and analysis focus
SMB without dedicated finance team and FP&A requirements
best_when: A mid-to-large enterprise finance team using Planful wants AI agents to automate data loading, trigger plan cycles, retrieve reports, and integrate FP&A data with ERP and BI systems.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Financial planning data and budget models drive real financial decisions. Data loading errors can corrupt planning models and mislead forecasts.

auth.notes: Planful uses OAuth 2.0 with client credentials for API access. Enterprise customer credentials available via Planful admin configuration. Token-based authentication for all API calls.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise FP&A platform pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts per user; pricing by module and user count
pricing.notes: PE-backed enterprise FP&A platform. Competes with Adaptive Insights/Workday and Anaplan. API access included with enterprise subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise SLA rate limits; bulk data loads may require async processing

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Financial planning model errors mislead business decisions
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API via admin configuration
No webhooks — polling-based workflow for triggered calculations
Data loading errors are silent in some cases — validate loaded data after each import
Bulk data loads (budgets, actuals) are async — implement status polling
Finance domain knowledge required — understand Planful's hierarchy and dimension model
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Financial planning and budget data drives executive decisions. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. Enterprise-only. Limited public docs.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial planning and budget data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. Enterprise-only.
